result.stdout:
Description:
  Command line interface for working with Altinn 3 Applications

Usage:
  altinn-studio [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  upgrade  Upgrade an app
  version  Print version of altinn-studio cli

commands.payload:
Description:
  Command line interface for working with Altinn 3 Applications

Usage:
  altinn-studio [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  upgrade  Upgrade an app
  version  Print version of altinn-studio cli

result.stdout:
Description:
  Upgrade an app

Usage:
  altinn-studio upgrade [command] [options]

Options:
  --folder <folder>  The project folder to read [default: CurrentDirectory]
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

Commands:
  frontend  Upgrade an app from using App-Frontend v3 to v4
  backend   Upgrade an app from app-lib-dotnet v7 to v8

commands.payload:
Description:
  Upgrade an app

Usage:
  altinn-studio upgrade [command] [options]

Options:
  --folder <folder>  The project folder to read [default: CurrentDirectory]
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

Commands:
  frontend  Upgrade an app from using App-Frontend v3 to v4
  backend   Upgrade an app from app-lib-dotnet v7 to v8

result.stdout:
Description:
  Upgrade an app from app-lib-dotnet v7 to v8

Usage:
  altinn-studio upgrade backend [options]

Options:
  --folder <folder>                          The project folder to read [default: CurrentDirectory]
  --project <project>                        The project file to read relative to --folder [default: App/App.csproj]
  --process <process>                        The process file to read relative to --folder [default: App/config/process/process.bpmn]
  --appsettings-folder <appsettings-folder>  The folder where the appsettings.*.json files are located [default: App]
  --target-version <target-version>          The target version to upgrade to [default: 8.0.0]
  --target-framework <target-framework>      The target dotnet framework version to upgrade to [default: net8.0]
  --skip-csproj-upgrade                      Skip csproj file upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-dockerfile-upgrade                  Skip Dockerfile upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-code-upgrade                        Skip code upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-process-upgrade                     Skip process file upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-appsettings-upgrade                 Skip appsettings file upgrade [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                             Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Upgrade an app from app-lib-dotnet v7 to v8

Usage:
  altinn-studio upgrade backend [options]

Options:
  --folder <folder>                          The project folder to read [default: CurrentDirectory]
  --project <project>                        The project file to read relative to --folder [default: App/App.csproj]
  --process <process>                        The process file to read relative to --folder [default: App/config/process/process.bpmn]
  --appsettings-folder <appsettings-folder>  The folder where the appsettings.*.json files are located [default: App]
  --target-version <target-version>          The target version to upgrade to [default: 8.0.0]
  --target-framework <target-framework>      The target dotnet framework version to upgrade to [default: net8.0]
  --skip-csproj-upgrade                      Skip csproj file upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-dockerfile-upgrade                  Skip Dockerfile upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-code-upgrade                        Skip code upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-process-upgrade                     Skip process file upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-appsettings-upgrade                 Skip appsettings file upgrade [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                             Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Upgrade an app from using App-Frontend v3 to v4

Usage:
  altinn-studio upgrade frontend [options]

Options:
  --folder <folder>                                    The project folder to read [default: CurrentDirectory]
  --target-version <target-version>                    The target version to upgrade to [default: 4]
  --index-file <index-file>                            The name of the Index.cshtml file relative to --folder [default: App/views/Home/Index.cshtml]
  --skip-index-file-upgrade                            Skip Index.cshtml upgrade [default: False]
  --ui-folder <ui-folder>                              The folder containing layout files relative to --folder [default: App/ui/]
  --texts-folder <texts-folder>                        The folder containing text files relative to --folder [default: App/config/texts/]
  --layout-set-name <layout-set-name>                  The name of the layout set to be created [default: form]
  --application-metadata <application-metadata>        The path of the applicationmetadata.json file relative to --folder [default: App/config/applicationmetadata.json]
  --skip-layout-set-upgrade                            Skip layout set upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-settings-upgrade                              Skip layout settings upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-layout-upgrade                                Skip layout files upgrade [default: False]
  --convert-group-titles                               Convert 'title' in repeating groups to 'summaryTitle' [default: False]
  --skip-schema-ref-upgrade                            Skip schema reference upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-footer-upgrade                                Skip footer upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-custom-receipt-upgrade                        Skip custom receipt upgrade [default: False]
  --receipt-layout-set-name <receipt-layout-set-name>  The name of the layout set to be created for the custom receipt [default: receipt]
  --skip-checks                                        Skip checks [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                                       Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Upgrade an app from using App-Frontend v3 to v4

Usage:
  altinn-studio upgrade frontend [options]

Options:
  --folder <folder>                                    The project folder to read [default: CurrentDirectory]
  --target-version <target-version>                    The target version to upgrade to [default: 4]
  --index-file <index-file>                            The name of the Index.cshtml file relative to --folder [default: App/views/Home/Index.cshtml]
  --skip-index-file-upgrade                            Skip Index.cshtml upgrade [default: False]
  --ui-folder <ui-folder>                              The folder containing layout files relative to --folder [default: App/ui/]
  --texts-folder <texts-folder>                        The folder containing text files relative to --folder [default: App/config/texts/]
  --layout-set-name <layout-set-name>                  The name of the layout set to be created [default: form]
  --application-metadata <application-metadata>        The path of the applicationmetadata.json file relative to --folder [default: App/config/applicationmetadata.json]
  --skip-layout-set-upgrade                            Skip layout set upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-settings-upgrade                              Skip layout settings upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-layout-upgrade                                Skip layout files upgrade [default: False]
  --convert-group-titles                               Convert 'title' in repeating groups to 'summaryTitle' [default: False]
  --skip-schema-ref-upgrade                            Skip schema reference upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-footer-upgrade                                Skip footer upgrade [default: False]
  --skip-custom-receipt-upgrade                        Skip custom receipt upgrade [default: False]
  --receipt-layout-set-name <receipt-layout-set-name>  The name of the layout set to be created for the custom receipt [default: receipt]
  --skip-checks                                        Skip checks [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                                       Show help and usage information
